시편 108:1.content: My heart is steadfast, God. I will sing and I will make music with my soul.

시편 108:2.content: Wake up, harp and lyre! I will wake up the dawn.

시편 108:3.content: I will give thanks to you, Yahweh, among the nations. I will sing praises to you among the peoples.

시편 108:4.content: For your loving kindness is great above the heavens. Your faithfulness reaches to the skies.

시편 108:5.content: Be exalted, God, above the heavens! Let your glory be over all the earth.

시편 108:6.content: That your beloved may be delivered, save with your right hand, and answer us.

시편 108:7.content: God has spoken from his sanctuary: “In triumph, I will divide Shechem, and measure out the valley of Succoth.

시편 108:8.content: Gilead is mine. Manasseh is mine. Ephraim also is my helmet. Judah is my scepter.

시편 108:9.content: Moab is my wash pot. I will toss my sandal on Edom. I will shout over Philistia.”

시편 108:10.content: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who has led me to Edom?

시편 108:11.content: Haven’t you rejected us, God? You don’t go out, God, with our armies.

시편 108:12.content: Give us help against the enemy, for the help of man is vain.

시편 108:13.content: Through God, we will do valiantly. For it is he who will tread down our enemies.
